tokenRules.message: Hex color hardcoded. Use semantic tokens (var(--primary), var(--bg-surface), var(--text-default), ...).
RGB/HSL hardcoded. Use semantic tokens via var(--*).
Tailwind palette color. Use semantic webkit tokens (var(--primary), var(--text-default), var(--bg-surface), ...).
Raw Tailwind text size. Use a generated typography class (text-heading-md, text-body-sm, text-button-lg, ...).
PrimeVue/PrimeFlex color utility. Use semantic webkit tokens (var(--text-default), var(--bg-surface), ...).

props.name: maxHeight
props.doc: Max height (CSS length). The viewport scrolls dynamically: horizontal scroll appears automatically when columns overflow the width; vertical scroll appears only when `maxHeight` is set smaller than the content (under the sticky header).

props.name: border
props.doc: Draw the outer card border around the table. Off by default (the table is typically framed by a surrounding surface); set `border` / `:border="…"` to draw the `var(--border-default)` outline. The internal row dividers are unaffected.

props.name: data
props.doc: Data-driven mode: row records.

props.name: columns
props.doc: Data-driven mode: column definitions (`{ id?, accessorKey?, header?, enableSorting?, grow?, principal?, frozen?, width?, align?, kind?, resizable? }`; `width` (px) sets a fixed pixel column (also needed when a frozen column precedes another frozen column on the same edge, so sticky offsets can be summed); a `grow` column without `width` keeps a shared fixed basis so the header and body stay aligned and the cell never wraps. A column with no `grow` defaults to weight `2` for the **principal** column and `1` for the rest, so the columns fill the available space proportionally. The principal column is the one flagged `principal: true`, or — when none is flagged — the first non-action column. A `kind: 'action'` column is automatically pinned to the trailing (right) edge — staying reachable while the rest scrolls horizontally — and is never resizable. **`resizable: true`** opts a column into a live mouse/touch drag-to-resize handle on its header (native pointer events; the `@tanstack/vue-table` exception covers sorting/pagination/selection/visibility, not sizing). On the first drag of any divider every flexible column freezes at its current rendered width; from then on dragging changes **only that column** and the table grows (horizontal scroll) — the others are untouched. The drag floor is the column's own content width (header label + visible body cells), so a column never shrinks past its content. Frozen and action columns ignore `resizable`. When non-empty, the table renders itself via TanStack.

props.name: rowKey
props.doc: Field used as the stable row id (for selection).

props.name: enableSorting
props.doc: Enable sorting globally; per-column `enableSorting` overrides.

props.name: enableRowSelection
props.doc: Add a leading selection-checkbox column.

props.name: selectOnRowClick
props.doc: Data-driven mode: clicking a row toggles its selection (requires `enableRowSelection`); interactive cells still own their own click.

props.name: headerVariant
props.doc: Header density (data-driven): `compact` shrinks the column-header row's height and padding. Forwarded to the `TableHeader`'s `variant`.

props.name: paginated
props.doc: Render a Paginator in the footer.

props.name: pageSize
props.doc: Rows per page when paginated.

props.name: sorting
props.doc: v-model:sorting (TanStack SortingState).

props.name: rowSelection
props.doc: v-model:rowSelection (TanStack RowSelectionState).

props.name: columnVisibility
props.doc: v-model:columnVisibility (TanStack VisibilityState).

props.name: globalFilter
props.doc: v-model:globalFilter text.

props.name: pagination
props.doc: v-model:pagination (TanStack PaginationState).

props.name: manualSorting
props.doc: Server-side sorting: emit events, do not sort locally.

props.name: manualPagination
props.doc: Server-side pagination: emit events, do not slice locally.

props.name: manualFiltering
props.doc: Server-side filtering: emit events, do not filter locally.

props.name: rowCount
props.doc: Total row count for manual pagination.

props.name: rowsPerPageOptions
props.doc: Rows-per-page options shown in the footer selector.

events.name: update:sorting
events.notes: v-model:sorting.

events.name: update:rowSelection
events.notes: v-model:rowSelection.

events.name: update:columnVisibility
events.notes: v-model:columnVisibility.

events.name: update:globalFilter
events.notes: v-model:globalFilter.

events.name: update:pagination
events.notes: v-model:pagination.

events.name: row-click
events.notes: Fires when a rendered row is clicked (data-driven mode).

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Composition mode: the scrollable region (TableCaption, TableHeader, TableBody).

slots.name: footer
slots.notes: Footer region rendered below the scroll viewport (e.g. TableFooter + Paginator), so it never scrolls with the body. In data-driven mode it renders automatically when `paginated`.

slots.name: caption
slots.notes: Data-driven mode: caption content (wrapped in TableCaption), fixed above the scroll viewport.

slots.name: title
slots.notes: Title text shown at the start of the toolbar band, fixed above the scroll viewport (both modes).

slots.name: toolbar
slots.notes: Action band (search, filter trigger, refresh, export, column-selector) above the scroll viewport, end-aligned beside the title. `table` is the TanStack instance in data-driven mode, `undefined` in composition mode.

slots.name: filters
slots.notes: Active-filter chips row below the toolbar (both modes); same `table` scope as `toolbar`.

slots.name: empty
slots.notes: Data-driven mode: shown when there are no rows. Defaults to an empty-state block (illustration + title + description) following Figma; override the slot for custom copy/actions.

props.name: maxHeight
props.doc: Max height (CSS length). The viewport scrolls dynamically: horizontal scroll appears automatically when columns overflow the width; vertical scroll appears only when `maxHeight` is set smaller than the content (under the sticky header).

props.name: border
props.doc: Draw the outer card border around the table. Off by default (the table is typically framed by a surrounding surface); set `border` / `:border="…"` to draw the `var(--border-default)` outline. The internal row dividers are unaffected.

props.name: data
props.doc: Data-driven mode: row records.

props.name: columns
props.doc: Data-driven mode: column definitions (`{ id?, accessorKey?, header?, enableSorting?, grow?, principal?, frozen?, width?, align?, kind?, resizable? }`; `width` (px) sets a fixed pixel column (also needed when a frozen column precedes another frozen column on the same edge, so sticky offsets can be summed); a `grow` column without `width` keeps a shared fixed basis so the header and body stay aligned and the cell never wraps. A column with no `grow` defaults to weight `2` for the **principal** column and `1` for the rest, so the columns fill the available space proportionally. The principal column is the one flagged `principal: true`, or — when none is flagged — the first non-action column. A `kind: 'action'` column is automatically pinned to the trailing (right) edge — staying reachable while the rest scrolls horizontally — and is never resizable. **`resizable: true`** opts a column into a live mouse/touch drag-to-resize handle on its header (native pointer events; the `@tanstack/vue-table` exception covers sorting/pagination/selection/visibility, not sizing). On the first drag of any divider every flexible column freezes at its current rendered width; from then on dragging changes **only that column** and the table grows (horizontal scroll) — the others are untouched. The drag floor is the column's own content width (header label + visible body cells), so a column never shrinks past its content. Frozen and action columns ignore `resizable`. When non-empty, the table renders itself via TanStack.

slots.name: default

slots.name: footer
slots.notes: Footer region rendered below the scroll viewport (e.g. TableFooter + Paginator), so it never scrolls with the body. In data-driven mode it renders automatically when `paginated`.

slots.name: title

props.name: page
props.doc: Current page, 1-based (data-driven mode). Supports `v-model:page`.

props.name: total
props.doc: Total item count. When set, the Paginator runs in data-driven mode and renders its own controls.

props.name: pageSize
props.doc: Rows per page (data-driven mode). Supports `v-model:page-size`.

props.name: pageSizeOptions
props.doc: Page-size options offered in the rows-per-page selector.

props.name: siblingCount
props.doc: Page numbers shown on each side of the current page before collapsing into an overflow ellipsis.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.doc: Accessible name for the navigation landmark.

events.name: update:page
events.notes: Current page changed in data-driven mode (Previous / Next / page number). Supports `v-model:page`.

events.name: update:pageSize
events.notes: Rows-per-page changed via the internal selector. Supports `v-model:page-size`.

events.name: page-change
events.notes: Convenience action event fired alongside `update:page` whenever the page changes.

slots.name: info
slots.notes: Left region: page-info text (typically PaginatorInfo). In data-driven mode, overrides the default "Showing X to Y of Z entries" text.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Center region: pagination navigation buttons (composition mode only — ignored in data-driven mode, where the buttons are rendered internally).

slots.name: controls
slots.notes: Right region: rows-per-page selector (PaginatorPageSize). In data-driven mode, overrides the internally-rendered selector.

props.name: align
props.doc: Vertical alignment of nodes within the diagram.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Diagram content: `flow-node` and `flow-parallel`, in flow order.

props.name: align
props.doc: Vertical alignment of nodes within the diagram.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Diagram content: `flow-node` and `flow-parallel`, in flow order.

props.name: modelValue
props.doc: Bound pair of lists as `[sourceItems, targetItems]` (v-model).

props.name: dataKey
props.doc: Item field that uniquely identifies a record; enables selection tracking and stable keys.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables all selection and move controls and applies disabled tokens.

props.name: moveOnDoubleClick
props.doc: When true, double-clicking an item moves it to the opposite list. Set false to keep `item-double-click` firing without the move.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.notes: v-model update with the new `[sourceItems, targetItems]` pair.

events.name: move
events.notes: Fired after items move between lists, with the moved items.

events.name: item-double-click
events.notes: Fired when an option is double-clicked, with the item, its index, and which list it was in. Fires regardless of `moveOnDoubleClick`, but not while the component is disabled or a list is loading.

slots.name: default
slots.scope: { move, moveAll, hasSelection, count, disabled, loading }
slots.notes: Composition slot; receives `<PickList.Source>`, `<PickList.Controls>`, and `<PickList.Target>` in flow order. The scope exposes the move actions plus selection/loading state, so a consumer can render custom controls inside the root in place of `<PickList.Controls>`.

props.name: modelValue
props.doc: Bound pair of lists as `[sourceItems, targetItems]` (v-model).

props.name: dataKey
props.doc: Item field that uniquely identifies a record; enables selection tracking and stable keys.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables all selection and move controls and applies disabled tokens.

props.name: moveOnDoubleClick
props.doc: When true, double-clicking an item moves it to the opposite list. Set false to keep `item-double-click` firing without the move.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.notes: v-model update with the new `[sourceItems, targetItems]` pair.

events.name: move
events.notes: Fired after items move between lists, with the moved items.

events.name: item-double-click
events.notes: Fired when an option is double-clicked, with the item, its index, and which list it was in. Fires regardless of `moveOnDoubleClick`, but not while the component is disabled or a list is loading.

slots.name: default
slots.scope: { move, moveAll, hasSelection, count, disabled, loading }
slots.notes: Composition slot; receives `<PickList.Source>`, `<PickList.Controls>`, and `<PickList.Target>` in flow order. The scope exposes the move actions plus selection/loading state, so a consumer can render custom controls inside the root in place of `<PickList.Controls>`.

props.name: severity
props.doc: Visual severity variant (maps Error to danger).

props.name: title
props.doc: Primary message heading.

props.name: description
props.doc: Supporting body copy below the title.

props.name: icon
props.doc: PrimeIcons class override for the leading icon.

props.name: actionLabel
props.doc: Label for the built-in text action button; hidden when empty.

props.name: closable
props.doc: When true, shows a close control that dismisses the message.

props.name: life
props.doc: Duration in milliseconds before auto-dismiss; `0` disables auto-dismiss.

events.name: action
events.notes: Emitted when the built-in action button is clicked.

events.name: close
events.notes: Emitted when the message is dismissed manually or after `life` expires.

slots.name: action
slots.notes: Custom action control; replaces the built-in Button when provided.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Replaces the default icon + title + description layout.

props.name: title
props.doc: Primary heading announcing the empty resource.

props.name: description
props.doc: Supporting body copy below the title.

props.name: size
props.doc: Size token; affects the illustration size, the surrounding padding, and the gaps between illustration, text, and actions.

props.name: bordered
props.doc: When true, wraps the content in a bordered surface card; otherwise renders on a transparent background.

slots.name: icon
slots.notes: Decorative illustration centered above the title; rendered inside an `aria-hidden` container. Defaults to the bundled `EmptyStateIllustration` sub-component when not provided.

slots.name: actions
slots.notes: Action area below the description; consumer composes buttons and the documentation link.

props.name: status
props.doc: status.

props.name: loading
props.doc: Shows loading state and disables activation.

props.name: label
props.doc: Visible label text.

props.name: position
props.doc: Corner (or edge-center) the stack is anchored to.

props.name: duration
props.doc: Default auto-dismiss time in ms each toast inherits; a per-toast `duration` overrides it, and `0` keeps the toast until dismissed.

props.name: max
props.doc: Maximum simultaneously visible toasts per corner before the rest queue behind.

props.name: expand
props.doc: Lay the stack out fully expanded with a gap; when `false` the resting stack overlaps into a peek.

props.name: closable
props.doc: Show an always-visible close control on every toast; a per-toast `closable` option overrides it.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Optional override for a single toast's body. `toast` is the store entry (`{ id, type, message, description?, action?, duration }`); `dismiss` dismisses that entry. When omitted, the `Toaster` composes `ToastItem` + `Title`/`Description`/`Action`/`Close` from the entry.

props.name: position
props.doc: Corner (or edge-center) the stack is anchored to.

props.name: duration
props.doc: Default auto-dismiss time in ms each toast inherits; a per-toast `duration` overrides it, and `0` keeps the toast until dismissed.

props.name: max
props.doc: Maximum simultaneously visible toasts per corner before the rest queue behind.

props.name: expand
props.doc: Lay the stack out fully expanded with a gap; when `false` the resting stack overlaps into a peek.

props.name: closable
props.doc: Show an always-visible close control on every toast; a per-toast `closable` option overrides it.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Optional override for a single toast's body. `toast` is the store entry (`{ id, type, message, description?, action?, duration }`); `dismiss` dismisses that entry. When omitted, the `Toaster` composes `ToastItem` + `Title`/`Description`/`Action`/`Close` from the entry.

props.name: kind
props.doc: Geometry: a rounded rectangular block (`shape`) or a circle.

props.name: width
props.doc: CSS width (any length).

props.name: height
props.doc: CSS height (any length); for a circle, set equal to `width`.

props.name: animated
props.doc: Shimmer while loading; suppressed under reduced motion.

props.name: value
props.doc: Current progress, relative to `max`.

props.name: max
props.doc: Upper bound; percentage = `value / max * 100`.

props.name: shape
props.doc: Track and fill corner-radius variant.

props.name: size
props.doc: Bar height token.

props.name: indeterminate
props.doc: Loading state; animates a sliding segment and ignores `value`.

props.name: modelValue
props.doc: Selected value for v-model. A `Date` (or null) in single mode; a `{ start, end }` range object in range mode.

props.name: mode
props.doc: Selection mode. Single picks one date; range picks a start and end date.

props.name: min
props.doc: Earliest selectable date; earlier days render disabled.

props.name: max
props.doc: Latest selectable date; later days render disabled.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables the whole grid and navigation, applying disabled tokens.

props.name: showHeader
props.doc: Shows the month/year label and previous/next month navigation.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.notes: v-model. The selected `Date` (single) or `{ start, end }` (range).

events.name: month-change
events.notes: Emitted when the visible month changes via navigation or keyboard paging. Payload is `{ year, month }` (month is 0-indexed).

props.name: modelValue
props.doc: Two-way bound value of the field.

props.name: placeholder
props.doc: Placeholder shown when the field is empty.

props.name: type
props.doc: Native input type. Restricted to single-line variants the field treats identically.

props.name: maxLength
props.doc: Native `maxlength` — maximum number of characters allowed.

props.name: size
props.doc: Size token; affects height only — padding and typography are constant. Heights: small=28px, medium=32px, large=40px.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables interaction and applies disabled tokens.

props.name: readonly
props.doc: Marks the field read-only; value is visible but not editable. Native pass-through.

props.name: required
props.doc: Marks the field as required; sets native `required` and `aria-required`. Visual indicator (asterisk) is owned by the wrapping form-field, not by this component.

props.name: invalid
props.doc: Applies the invalid border + ring tokens and sets `aria-invalid`.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.notes: Emitted on native `input` event with the new value.

slots.name: iconLeft
slots.notes: Hidden from assistive tech (`aria-hidden="true"`).

slots.name: iconRight
slots.notes: Hidden from assistive tech (`aria-hidden="true"`).

props.name: modelValue
props.doc: v-model value (always numeric; cleared input falls back to `min ?? 0`).

props.name: placeholder
props.doc: Text shown when the input is empty.

props.name: size
props.doc: Size token; affects height, padding, and typography.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables interaction and applies disabled tokens.

props.name: readonly
props.doc: Marks the field as read-only; spinner buttons are inert.

props.name: invalid
props.doc: Applies the invalid border/ring tokens.

props.name: required
props.doc: Marks the field as required for assistive tech.

props.name: min
props.doc: Minimum allowed value; spinner stops at this bound.

props.name: max
props.doc: Maximum allowed value; spinner stops at this bound.

props.name: step
props.doc: Increment used by the spinner buttons and arrow keys.

props.name: showButtons
props.doc: Renders the chevron-up/chevron-down spinner controls.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.notes: Emitted on every value change (typing or spinner).

events.name: change
events.notes: Emitted when the user commits the value (blur or Enter).

slots.name: prefix
slots.notes: Content rendered before the input (e.g. `R$`).

slots.name: suffix
slots.notes: Content rendered after the input, before the spinner buttons (e.g. `%`).

props.name: modelValue
props.doc: Two-way bound value of the underlying `InputText`.

props.name: label
props.doc: Text rendered inside the `Label`. When empty, the label row is omitted.

props.name: placeholder
props.doc: Placeholder forwarded to the `InputText`.

props.name: helperText
props.doc: Auxiliary text rendered inside `HelperText`. When empty, the helper row is omitted **except** when `disabled` is true — in that case the component falls back to a default disabled message so the lock icon always has matching copy.

props.name: size
props.doc: Size forwarded to the `InputText`. Heights: small=28px, medium=32px, large=40px.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables the input and switches the helper to `kind="disabled"` (lock icon).

props.name: readonly
props.doc: Marks the input read-only; value is visible but not editable. Native pass-through.

props.name: required
props.doc: Adds the `Required` tag to the `Label` and sets native `required` + `aria-required` on the input.

props.name: invalid
props.doc: Switches the helper to `kind="invalid"` and applies invalid border/ring tokens on the input.

props.name: inputId
props.doc: id for the native input; consumed by `Label` via `for` and by `aria-describedby` wiring. When empty, the component auto-generates an id via `useId()`.

props.name: name
props.doc: HTML name for the underlying input (form + vee-validate integration).

events.name: update:modelValue
events.notes: Re-emitted from the underlying `InputText` on every input event.

slots.name: iconLeft
slots.notes: Forwarded to the underlying `InputText#iconLeft` slot.

slots.name: iconRight
slots.notes: Forwarded to the underlying `InputText#iconRight` slot.

props.name: value
props.doc: Fallback text when the default slot is empty.

props.name: kind
props.doc: Visual variant; `disabled` also prepends a `pi pi-lock` icon.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Helper text; falls back to `value` prop when empty.

props.name: value
props.doc: Fallback text when the default slot is empty.

props.name: required
props.doc: Appends a `Required` tag next to the label text.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Label text; falls back to `value` prop when empty.

props.name: modelValue
props.doc: Two-way bound value of the field.

props.name: placeholder
props.doc: Placeholder shown when the field is empty.

props.name: maxLength
props.doc: Native `maxlength` — maximum number of characters allowed.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables interaction and applies disabled tokens. The toggle button inherits the disabled state.

props.name: readonly
props.doc: Marks the field read-only; value is visible but not editable. Toggle button stays operable.

props.name: required
props.doc: Marks the field as required; sets native `required` and `aria-required`. Visual indicator (asterisk) is owned by the wrapping form-field, not by this component.

props.name: invalid
props.doc: Applies the invalid border + ring tokens and sets `aria-invalid`.

props.name: toggleable
props.doc: When true, renders the visibility toggle button on the trailing edge of the field. When false, the field behaves as a plain password input with no toggle and the `iconRight` slot becomes available.

props.name: autocomplete
props.doc: Native `autocomplete` hint for password managers. Use `new-password` for sign-up and password-change flows.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.notes: Emitted on native `input` event with the new value.

slots.name: iconLeft
slots.notes: Leading icon rendered inside the field, before the input. Hidden from assistive tech (`aria-hidden="true"`).

slots.name: iconRight
slots.notes: Trailing icon rendered inside the field, after the input. **Only honored when `toggleable=false`** — the visibility toggle occupies this slot when enabled. Hidden from assistive tech (`aria-hidden="true"`).

props.name: modelValue
props.doc: Two-way bound value of the underlying `InputPassword`.

props.name: label
props.doc: Text rendered inside the `Label`. When empty, the label row is omitted.

props.name: placeholder
props.doc: Placeholder forwarded to the `InputPassword`.

props.name: helperText
props.doc: Auxiliary text rendered inside `HelperText`. When empty, the helper row is omitted **except** when `disabled` is true — in that case the component falls back to a default disabled message so the lock icon always has matching copy.

props.name: maxLength
props.doc: Native `maxlength` forwarded to the `InputPassword`.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables the input and switches the helper to `kind="disabled"` (lock icon).

props.name: readonly
props.doc: Marks the input read-only; value is visible but not editable. Native pass-through.

props.name: required
props.doc: Adds the `Required` tag to the `Label` and sets native `required` + `aria-required` on the input.

props.name: invalid
props.doc: Switches the helper to `kind="invalid"` and applies invalid border/ring tokens on the input.

props.name: toggleable
props.doc: Forwards to `InputPassword`. When true, renders the visibility toggle on the trailing edge; when false, the field behaves as a plain password input.

props.name: autocomplete
props.doc: Forwarded to the `InputPassword` for password-manager hints. Use `new-password` for sign-up and password-change flows.

props.name: inputId
props.doc: id for the native input; consumed by `Label` via `for` and by `aria-describedby` wiring.

props.name: name
props.doc: HTML name for the underlying input (form + vee-validate integration).

events.name: update:modelValue
events.notes: Re-emitted from the underlying `InputPassword` on every input event.

slots.name: iconLeft
slots.notes: Forwarded to the underlying `InputPassword#iconLeft` slot.

slots.name: iconRight
slots.notes: Forwarded to the underlying `InputPassword#iconRight` slot. Only honored when `toggleable=false` — the visibility toggle occupies this position when enabled.

props.name: modelValue
props.doc: Currently selected item value (v-model).

props.name: items
props.doc: Options rendered as selectable cards; each entry must include `value` and `label`.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables all options and applies disabled tokens.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.notes: v-model when the user selects an option.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Overrides the entire card body for an option.

slots.name: tag
slots.notes: Trailing content below label/description (e.g. plan badge).

props.name: label
props.doc: Fallback text when the default slot is empty.

props.name: size
props.doc: Size token; `medium` is 24px tall, `small` is 20px.

props.name: removable
props.doc: When true, renders a trailing remove button that emits `remove`.

events.name: remove
events.notes: Fires when `removable` is true and the remove button is activated (click / Enter / Space), after the chip's exit (fade-out) animation completes, so the parent removes the chip once it has animated out.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Chip content; falls back to `label` when empty.

props.name: modelValue
props.doc: Two-way bound value. Boolean in `binary` mode, scalar when paired with `value`, array when multi-selecting.

props.name: value
props.doc: Identifier for this checkbox in non-binary mode. Compared against `modelValue` (or included in the array).

props.name: binary
props.doc: When true, the checkbox toggles `modelValue` as a boolean (no `value` pairing).

props.name: indeterminate
props.doc: Renders the indeterminate visual (horizontal bar). Does not affect `modelValue`; the parent owns the tri-state logic.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables interaction and applies disabled tokens.

props.name: readonly
props.doc: Marks the field read-only; value is visible but cannot change via interaction.

props.name: inputId
props.doc: Forwarded to the inner `<input id>` for label association.

props.name: name
props.doc: HTML name for form submission.

props.name: tabindex
props.doc: Forwarded to the inner `<input tabindex>`.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.notes: Fires on activation. Payload is the next boolean (binary mode) or the next array (multi mode) or the matched value (single-value mode).

props.doc: Selected value for v-model.

props.name: trueValue
props.doc: Value emitted when checked.

props.name: falseValue
props.doc: Value emitted when unchecked.

props.name: description
props.doc: Secondary description.

props.doc: Helper badge text shown when disabled.

props.name: isToggled
props.doc: Toggled-on state. Bind with `v-model:isToggled="value"`. Mirrors the Figma `isToggled` variant.

props.name: type
props.doc: Visual variant. `privacy` renders a lock icon inside the handle (closed when off, open when on).

props.name: isFocused
props.doc: Forces the focused visual state regardless of keyboard focus. Mirrors the Figma `isFocused` variant.

events.name: update:isToggled
events.notes: Emitted when the user toggles the switch. Paired with `v-model:isToggled`.

props.name: modelValue
props.doc: Bound value (v-model).

props.name: placeholder
props.doc: Placeholder shown when the field is empty.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables interaction and applies disabled tokens.

props.name: readonly
props.doc: Marks the field as read-only; keeps focus styling, blocks edits.

props.name: invalid
props.doc: Applies invalid styling and sets `aria-invalid`. Combined with `required`, switches to warning border tone.

props.name: required
props.doc: Marks the field as required and sets `aria-required`.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.notes: v-model update.

slots.name: iconLeft
slots.notes: Optional leading icon, rendered at top-left inside the field.

slots.name: iconRight
slots.notes: Optional trailing icon, rendered at top-right. Suppressed when `disabled` (the lock icon takes over).

props.name: modelValue
props.doc: Two-way bound value of the underlying Textarea.

props.name: name
props.doc: HTML name for the underlying textarea (form integration).

props.name: label
props.doc: Text rendered inside the Label. When empty, the label row is omitted.

props.name: placeholder
props.doc: Placeholder forwarded to the Textarea.

props.name: helperText
props.doc: Auxiliary text rendered inside HelperText. When empty, the helper row is omitted.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables the textarea and switches the helper to `kind=disabled` (lock icon).

props.name: readonly
props.doc: Marks the textarea read-only; value is visible but not editable. Native pass-through.

props.name: required
props.doc: Adds the Required tag to the Label and sets native required + aria-required on the textarea.

props.name: invalid
props.doc: Switches the helper to `kind=invalid` and applies invalid border tokens on the textarea.

props.name: inputId
props.doc: id for the native textarea; consumed by Label via `for` and by `aria-describedby` wiring.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.notes: v-model update.

props.name: open
props.doc: Controlled open state. Use with `v-model:open` or `@update:open`. When omitted, the component is uncontrolled.

props.name: placement
props.doc: Where the panel opens relative to the trigger. `'auto'` picks the best-fitting corner at open time based on viewport space.

props.name: offset
props.doc: Pixel gap between the trigger and the panel.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Prevents the trigger from opening the panel and applies disabled tokens.

events.name: update:open
events.notes: Fires on every open/closed transition; supports `v-model:open`.

events.name: select
events.payload: { value: string | number; event: MouseEvent | KeyboardEvent }
events.notes: Fires when an enabled option is activated (click, `Enter`/`Space`, or a `command` shortcut). The panel closes automatically and focus returns to the trigger when activated from inside the open panel.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Place `<Dropdown.Trigger>` followed by one or more `<Dropdown.Group>`.

slots.name: top
slots.notes: Sticky region rendered above the scrollable group list (e.g. search input).

slots.name: bottom
slots.notes: Sticky region rendered below the scrollable group list (e.g. footer action).

props.name: open

props.name: modelValue
props.doc: Two-way bound selection. Always an array; each item is the `value` of a selected `<MultiSelectOption>`.

props.name: open
props.doc: Controlled open state for the dropdown. Use with `v-model:open`.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.doc: Initial open state when uncontrolled.

props.name: placeholder
props.doc: Trigger placeholder shown when no option is selected.

props.name: size
props.doc: Size token; affects trigger height (small=28px, medium=32px, large=40px) matching `InputText`.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables the trigger and prevents opening; applies disabled tokens.

props.name: readonly
props.doc: Marks the field read-only; the current selection is visible but the dropdown cannot open.

props.name: required
props.doc: Marks the field as required; sets `aria-required` on the trigger. Visual indicator (asterisk) is owned by the wrapping form-field, not by this component.

props.name: invalid
props.doc: Applies the invalid border + ring tokens and sets `aria-invalid` on the trigger.

props.name: displayValue
props.doc: Custom formatter used by the trigger to render the selected labels; receives the current `modelValue` array.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.notes: Fires when an option is toggled; payload is the next selection array.

events.name: update:open
events.notes: Fires when the dropdown opens or closes.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Composition slot; receives `<MultiSelectTrigger>` and `<MultiSelectContent>` (and the option tree inside it).

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Root: compose `Container` (or `Left` + `Brand`), `Middle`/`Nav`, and `Right` sub-components.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Each sub-component (incl. `Container`) exposes `default` for region content.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: global-header-brand` exposes `default` for logo markup.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.doc: Accessible name for the navigation landmark.

slots.name: header
slots.notes: Named slot.

slots.name: footer
slots.notes: Named slot.

props.name: items
props.doc: Ordered path segments; the last entry is treated as the current page when `current` is omitted on that entry.

events.name: navigate
events.notes: Fires when an ancestor segment is activated.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: Custom composition (`BreadcrumbList` + items + separators). Used when `items` is empty.

props.name: label
props.doc: Visible segment label.

props.name: href
props.doc: Destination when the segment is a link (ignored when `current` is true).

props.name: current
props.doc: Marks the current page (last segment); renders as span with `aria-current="page"`.

props.name: showIcon
props.doc: When true, renders a leading PrimeIcons icon before the label.

props.name: icon
props.doc: PrimeIcons class for the leading icon when `showIcon` is true.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables interaction and applies disabled tokens.

events.name: click
events.notes: Fires when the segment is activated (link or button).

props.name: label
props.doc: Visible label rendered inside the link.

props.name: size
props.doc: Size token; affects height, gap, and typography.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables interaction and applies disabled tokens.

props.name: showIcon
props.doc: When true, renders the trailing icon.

props.name: icon
props.doc: PrimeIcons class for the trailing icon.

props.name: href
props.doc: Destination URL for the anchor.

props.name: target
props.doc: Link target when navigating.

slots.name: tag
slots.notes: Named slot.

events.name: update:value
events.notes: v-model:value.

events.name: update:value
events.notes: v-model:value.

props.name: text
props.doc: Plain text shown inside the tooltip.

props.name: placement
props.doc: Anchor side relative to the trigger.

props.name: delay
props.doc: Hover-open delay in milliseconds.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables tooltip activation.

props.name: open
props.doc: Controlled open state. Use with `v-model:open`.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.doc: Initial open state when uncontrolled.

events.name: update:open
events.notes: v-model:open. Fires on open and close.

events.name: show
events.notes: Emitted right after the open transition starts.

events.name: hide
events.notes: Emitted right after the close transition starts.

slots.name: default
slots.notes: The trigger element. Tooltip anchors to its bounding box.

props.name: open
props.doc: Controlled open state. Use with `v-model:open`.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.doc: Initial open state when uncontrolled.

props.name: closeable
props.doc: When true, overlay click and Escape close the dialog.

props.name: size
props.doc: Panel max-width preset passed to the inner Panel.

events.name: update:open
events.notes: v-model:open.

props.name: open
props.doc: Controlled open state. Use with `v-model:open`.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.doc: Initial open state when uncontrolled.

props.name: closeable
props.doc: When true, overlay click and Escape close the drawer.

props.name: side
props.doc: Edge the drawer panel slides from.

props.name: size
props.doc: Panel max-width preset (`small` 384px, `medium` 672px, `large` 1024px). Height is always 100% viewport.

events.name: update:open
events.notes: v-model:open.

props.name: size
props.doc: Max width of the panel shell.

props.name: title
props.doc: Main success heading in the card header region.

props.name: description
props.default: 'You just deployed a new application into'
props.doc: Supporting copy before the scope tag.

props.name: scope
props.doc: Scope label rendered in the header tag.

props.name: appName
props.doc: Deployed application name above the build log.

props.name: lines
props.doc: Build log entries passed to LogView.

props.name: stepsLabel
props.doc: Section label above the next-steps list.

props.name: steps
props.doc: Ordered next-step entries (title, description, icon per row).

props.name: actionLabel
props.doc: Primary footer button label.

props.name: visitLabel
props.doc: Visit link label in the card header.

props.name: visitHref
props.doc: Visit link destination URL.

props.name: showHeader
props.doc: When true, renders the top GlobalHeader bar with the brand slot.

props.name: disabled
props.doc: Disables toolbar controls and the primary action button.

events.name: action-click
events.notes: Fires when the primary footer button is activated.

events.notes: Fires when the visit link is activated.

events.name: step-click
events.notes: Fires when a next-step row is activated.

slots.name: header
slots.notes: Replaces the built-in GlobalHeader bar (brand + regions).

slots.name: success
slots.notes: Replaces the built-in congratulations header inside the CardBox header.

slots.name: logs
slots.notes: Replaces the built-in app name + LogView region in the CardBox content.

slots.name: steps
slots.notes: Replaces the built-in next-steps list in the CardBox footer.

slots.name: actions
slots.notes: Replaces the built-in footer primary button.
